# CalendarFold

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CalendarFold;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CalendarFold { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
date, month, year, event, birthday, birthdate, ics

## Categories
time, files

[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/calendar-fold)
